scope: Turn the 100-agent discovery pilot scaffold into operator-facing cluster packets and a readable brief

decision_context.prior_state: The repo already had the real 100-agent pilot scaffold, but it was still one large JSON packet that was awkward to hand off or collect against in batches.
decision_context.decision: Add a scaffold splitter and discovery markdown exporter, then generate the actual cluster packet bundle and pilot brief under research/meta.
decision_context.why_now: The next truthful step is to make the real pilot runnable in cluster-sized slices rather than pretending the collection phase has already happened.

files_expected.purpose: Adds cluster-packet splitting and discovery markdown export helpers.
Adds the split and brief CLI commands.
Covers cluster splitting and markdown export.
Stores the actual per-cluster collection packets for the pilot.
Provides an operator-facing summary of the cluster allocation.

planned_steps: Split the scaffold into per-cluster collection packets
Generate a markdown brief for the operator-facing discovery surface
Verify the new split and brief flows with the focused regression suite

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-brief --input research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_CLUSTER_PACKETS_2026-03-24.json --title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Brief" --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_BRIEF_2026-03-24.md
$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The cluster bundle contains 10 cluster packets covering all 100 agents
The brief renders the cluster allocation and next actions
The focused regression suite stays green

guardrails: Do not fabricate filled candidate submissions for the 100-agent pilot
Preserve the same cluster allocation and collection rules from the scaffold
Keep the result operator-facing and repo-local
